title: Accessories Guide
subtitle: Ưu tiên reroll chỉ số phụ (accessory) — theo Overall Order của tác giả

stats.name: Speed
stats.advice: Top priority for the both PVP and PVE. For PVE you want to give it to supports - Cleopatra, Atropos, or any other buffer that has to apply buffs before your main DPS heroes.

stats.name: ATK
stats.advice:
One of the top priorities; higher ATK = higher Heals/Shields/Buffs/Pledge etc. 
Get it as a 3rd priority, after you got Speed & Accuracy.
First if your aim is PVE (RO).

stats.name: Dodge
stats.advice: Top priority for PVP. Dodge is highly relevant, so counter it with the Accuracy is the one of the keys to securing Victory.

stats.name: Ultimate DMG Reduction
stats.advice: One of the top priorities; given the current state of the game, there's a lot of ULT spammers in the PVP (Pandora, Diana, Eve, Odin..) so reducing those will come in handy.

stats.name: Healing
stats.advice:
Priority on the heroes that need sustain the most and the Doomsdayers.
After that, get it for anyone - starting with the heroes you're using the most (in PVP) - for PVE, this effect isn't going to matter.

stats.name: DEF
stats.advice: Skip. Defence is completely useless in PVP/PVE game modes.
stats.example: Only start to reroll these once you're truly done with every other accessory stat that takes the higher priority over it.

stats.name: Skill DMG Reduction
stats.advice: Reducing Skill Damage can come in handy in some cases but it's nowhere near the priority for the rerolls, only last resort.
stats.example: Anyone with a Taunt (or Tank) effect in the team. The one that soaks the damage the most.

stats.name: Crit Rate
stats.advice: Not really a priority; only good vs. Protector based teams, Wukong or any other lesser used hero (like Lee). Most of the times this won't be crucial factor in the battle - skip until you've done everything else.

stats.name: Crit DMG
stats.advice:
Epic is worth considering - 50% Crit DMG could come in handy in RO.

Legendary is a skip.

stats.name: HP / Round
stats.advice: HP/Round doesn't matter as it's easily substituted by anything else (such as Atropos heals).

stats.name: Accuracy
stats.advice: If you're seeing your heroes missing a lot - get its Epic version, but do not roll for the Legendary variation.

stats.name: HP
stats.advice: Useless. Don't waste your rolls, get a Green ATK for RO if needed.
stats.example: Any hero that you're running in RO and need some extra ATK (won't impact much, maybe not at all).
